case_title: HUGO FORTIZ ESCANDON VS. GEICO CASUALTY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESCANDON, HUGO FORTIZ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GEICO CASUALTY COMPANY PLAINTIFF SHALL TAKE NOTHING ON HIS CLAIM. IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT DEFENDANT IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE STORAGE RELATED CHARGES UNDER THE TERMS OF THE POLICY. NOTHING IN THE COURT'S ORDER PROHIBITS PLAINTIFF FROM RECEIVING ALL BENEFITS TO WHICH HE IS DUE UNDER THE TERMS OF HIS POLICY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF HUGO FORTIZ ESCANDON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GEICO CASUALTY COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RYANELL GALIMBA, VIRTUAL AUTO DAMAGE SUPERVISOR AND JAHNA LUKAS, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS THE COURT TO PROVIDE SPANISH INTERPRETER AND ASSISTED BY SPANISH COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE (#292302). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JAHNA LUKAS, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. FILED BY DEFENDANT GEICO CASUALTY COMPANY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ESCANDON, HUGO FORTIZ AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO CASUALTY COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
